data.name: Octagon Agent
data.description: An intelligent orchestrator for specialized Public and Private Market agents.

data.name: Octagon Prediction Markets Agent
data.description: A high-fidelity research agent engineered for prediction market intelligence. It automates deep-dive reporting by analyzing Kalshi event dynamics, catalysts, and probability discrepancies to provide a structured view of trade opportunities.

data.name: Octagon Deep Research Agent
data.description: A comprehensive agent that can utilize multiple sources for deep research analysis.
